title: App can't reach api.internal: name resolves to the wrong address
description_md:
An internal service is reachable on this host as `api.internal` (port 8080). The app that calls it is now failing to connect, even though the API service itself is healthy. Someone edited the static hosts file during a migration. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), find why the name resolves wrong, and fix it.

You're done when `curl http://api.internal:8080/` succeeds.
